articles.title: Weather Today [07 May, 2026]: Check IMD Rain Predictions, Heat Alert, Snow & Thunderstorms Across Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Karnataka, Rajasthan, Jammu, Hyderabad & More — Full City-Wise Forecast - The Sunday Guardian

Will it Rain or Snow in the Hills?
- Himachal and Uttarakhand: Light to moderate rainfall
- Jammu and Kashmir: Cloudy with isolated rain spells
- Snowfall: Not expected at present elevations
Temperatures in hill stations range between 8°C to 22°C, depending on altitude.
Why Is the Heat Building Up So Fast Across India?
Rapid warming is linked to:
Day temperatures are increasing by 0.5°C to 1.2°C daily in several northern states.
Where are the Heat Wave Alerts?
- Delhi-NCR: Rising risk zone (39°C–45°C range forecast)

FAQ’s: All About Today’s Weather
Q1: Will heatwave conditions worsen this week?
A1: Yes, especially in Rajasthan and Delhi NCR after May 9.
Q2: Is rain expected in North India?
A2: Yes, isolated thunderstorms in UP, Punjab and Delhi.
Q3: Which region is wettest right now?
A3: Northeast India, especially Assam and Meghalaya.
Q4: Is Mumbai facing extreme heat?
A4: No, coastal breeze keeps it stable around 31°C.
Q5: When will relief arrive?
A5: Partial relief may come after mid-May with pre-monsoon showers.
Disclaimer: Weather forecasts are for guidance only. Conditions may change rapidly. Always check local authorities for emergencies and travel alerts.
